expectations.text: Establishes ordering: electrode group must exist before LFPSelection.insert1 can succeed
expectations.evidence: Opens with 'LFPElectrodeGroup must exist before you can LFPSelection.insert1' and explains the FK error if the group is missing.

expectations.text: Explains the group is a reusable electrode bundle while the selection picks group + interval + filter for one populate run
expectations.evidence: 'LFPElectrodeGroup = which channels (a reusable electrode bundle) ... LFPSelection = which channels × which time interval × which filter × which output rate (one row per populate run)'.
